title: Raffl's Upfault
body:
# Raffl's Upfault

My take on a very simple default edit!

### Goal

The texture pack focuses on **keeping the vanilla look**, only changing the not so great textures for some nicer ones. Only tools, GUI, fire and a few other things were edited. It's textures are desingned to make everything look as clean as possible.

### Textures

**Changes:**
- Tools
- Shorter swords
- Armor
- some blocks
- leaves
- Item model sizes
- Particles
- Transparent GUI
- Some utility things
- Low fire
- Clear water from outside the water
- Clear vision from inside the water
- Clear vision from inside the lava
- Small totem pop
- Always mushroom island grass color
- crosshair

### Preview of the armor

![Preview of the armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd63d0d875543f96c0b5478c712cbdb8ce9c9bfe.jpeg)


### Tips

Use [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) for connected textures.

Use [Fabric Skyboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes) and [Fabric Skyboxes Interop](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes-interop) for custom skies. [Dramatic Skys](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dramatic-skys) fits perfectly!

You have to set "Leaves" in "Options" -> "Video Settings" to at least "Default" in order for them to work.

**Check it out yourself!**
